videos.title: MB and Oh Se-hoon Visit Cheonggyecheon... "Whoa!!!" at Citizens Suddenly Rushing At Them [On-site...
videos.subtitle_summary: MB (Mayor) and Oh Se-hoon visited Cheonggyecheon, a famous stream in Seoul. They were greeted by citizens who rushed towards them, surprised. The Mayor mentioned that they had been coming to Cheonggyecheon annually since the completion of the restoration project, which was initiated after the 2002 World Cup. He also shared that foreign visitors have expressed amazement at the stream, finding it remarkable that water flows through the city.

videos.title: [Today's News] MB and Oh Se-hoon Spotted at Cheonggyecheon... "Unqualified!" Shouting Causes Upro...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Seoul mayoral candidate Lee Kang-san has been announced.
2. At Cheonggyecheon, MB (possibly a political figure) and Oh Se-hoon were spotted. They are from the same party, the Free Korea Party.
3. The gathering at Cheonggyecheon is an annual event held in May for those who love Cheonggyecheon Stream. This year, it's during the election season. The person who made Cheonggyecheon beautiful is also present.

videos.title: [스팟Live] *풀영상* 스승의 날 청계천서 만난 오세훈-MB..."마음속 스승" | 26.05.15
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 오세훈과 이명박 전 대통령이 청계천을 함께 걸었다는 사실을 설명한다.
2. 청계천 보건 사업으로부터 인사이트를 받았고, 그것은 시민들의 삶을 향상시키기 위해 녹색 공간과 수변 공간을 활용한 도시 개발 프로젝트를 시작했다는 내용이 있다.
3. 서울의 한강변은 한강 버스 사업으로 인해 물과 녹지 공간이 어우러진 서울의 모습이 되었고, 시민들에게 마음의 위안을 제공하는 공간이 된다는 것이 언급된다.

videos.title: 미 국방부, 유럽의 우려 속에 폴란드 미군 4,000명 파병 계획 취소 | NewsX World
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Trump and Xi Jinping agree that Thrron should not develop nuclear weapons, and both leaders call for the immediate reopening of commerce in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's foreign minister rejects American leadership proposals due to a lack of diplomatic trust.
2. Deep divisions over the war in Iran prevent BRICS nations from releasing a unified diplomatic declaration, highlighting growing geopolitical fractures. The US president discusses high-stakes defense sales with China's leader in Beijing.
3. The Pentagon cancels plans for military reinforcements in Eastern Europe without prior notice, causing strategic concerns across all NATO nations. Prime Minister Modi signs major agreements targeting defense and energy infrastructure with the UAE to strengthen their geopolitical alliance.
